since_last: 66% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.19%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.42% · BTC +2.47% · Gold +1.27% · Nasdaq100 +1.07%. 66% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.19%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.19%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.31%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +9.77%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +9.77%, CBRS +9.63%, SKHY +8.33%, AMAT +7.25%, MU +6.72%. Laggards: OKTA -4.12%, CRWD -3.47%, WDAY -3.32%, S -3.29%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +6.17% at $127.24
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +6.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
